name: Balut
description: A beloved Filipino street food delicacy featuring a boiled fertilized duck egg served warm with salt or vinegar.

name: BBQ Skewer
description: Filipino-style marinated pork skewers grilled over an open flame for a smoky, sweet, and savory flavor.

name: Chicken Inasal
description: Grilled Filipino chicken marinated in a flavorful blend of spices, calamansi, and annatto oil for a smoky and juicy finish.

name: Crispy Pata
description: Deep-fried pork leg with perfectly crispy skin and tender meat, served with a savory dipping sauce.

name: Embutido
description: Classic Filipino-style meatloaf made with seasoned ground pork, vegetables, raisins, and eggs, steamed to perfection.

name: Ilocos Empanada
description: A crispy Filipino empanada filled with savory vegetables, egg, and meat, inspired by the famous flavors of Ilocos.

name: Lechon Kawali
description: Crispy deep-fried pork belly with juicy, flavorful meat and crunchy skin, served with traditional dipping sauce.

name: Lumpiang Gulay (Small)
description: Crispy Filipino vegetable spring rolls filled with fresh mixed vegetables and served with a savory dipping sauce.

name: Lumpiang Gulay (Big)
description: Large Filipino-style vegetable spring rolls packed with fresh vegetables and fried until perfectly golden and crispy.

name: Shanghai
description: Crunchy Filipino lumpia rolls filled with seasoned ground pork and vegetables, perfect for sharing and celebrations.

name: Shrimp & Pork Siomai
description: Steamed dumplings filled with a savory blend of shrimp and pork, served with soy sauce and calamansi.

name: Chicken Palabok
description: Steamed dumplings filled with a savory blend of shrimp and pork, served with soy sauce and calamansi.

name: Chicken Spaghetti
description: Steamed dumplings filled with a savory blend of shrimp and pork, served with soy sauce and calamansi.
